editorial_accuracy.notes: Evidence tier badges in chapter headers with counts. Source counts on homepage cards. In-chapter TOC for section navigation. Keyword-based related chapters augment manual cross-links.

information_design.notes: Chapter TOC for long articles. Evidence composition visible at-a-glance in header and homepage. Related chapters now include algorithmic topic matching.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Back-to-top button. Scroll position persistence across visits. Evidence badges use semantic tier colors. All existing features intact.

code_quality.notes: Zero TS errors. Reusable hooks (useScrollRestore). Reusable components (BackToTop). No hardcoded values.

accessibility.notes: Evidence badges have aria-labels. TOC nav has aria-label. Back-to-top has aria-label. All heading anchors have scroll-mt-20 for sticky header offset.

security.notes: CSP meta tag restricts resources to self + Google Fonts + Stripe. X-Content-Type-Options nosniff. Strict referrer policy. All external links noopener noreferrer.
